commit_scope: Begin moving grammar/dialect loading from the shell + python wrappers into form-cli (the lesson of the silent ask+ break). Ships form-loader.fk (four-way 255): the dialect-detection + prelude-resolution DECISIONS the wrappers hardcode, now a proven Form recipe — fl-is-bml? / fl-dialect (the exact call form_cli_ask.sh got wrong) and fl-preludes-line (read the preludes list from the source). Names that the BML COMPILE is already a kernel primitive (compile_source_section) and the north star: a Form-native loader behind form-cli run.
evidence_refs: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-loader.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-loader-band.fk -> '✓ ... → 255' and 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree on every sample.'
Manifest row added: 'form-loader fks 255' beside its kin trust-row.

Grounding of what moves vs what is already home: validate.sh is the one correct dialect-aware loader (grep '^section [' to detect BML, the compiler chain form-ontology-loader -> line-grammar -> bmf-core -> bmf-grammar -> bml -> source-compiler -> form-bml, content-hash prelude cache, then link). The kernel ALREADY exposes compile_source_section / compile_source_text / source_compile_last_error (form-kernel-go/main.go + server_test.go). substring(s,a,b)=s[a:b] and str_find(s,needle,from) returning negative on miss are confirmed in main.go — the primitives the detector needs.

The band proves the moved-in decisions four-way: a BML 'section [form.bml]' source -> fl-is-bml?=1 / fl-dialect='bml'; an s-expr source -> 0 / 'sexpr'; fl-preludes-line extracts ' a.fk b.fk' from 'preludes: a.fk b.fk' and '' from a no-preludes source. Verdict 255.

Scope honesty: this ships the DECISION brain (dialect + prelude), not yet the full Form loader behind a `form-cli run` entry, which composes these with compile_source_section to load+run dialect-aware. That is named as the north star and the next step (it includes repairing form_cli_ask.sh to call the loader).

Edges: docs/coherence-substrate/INDEX.md row; the form-loader teaching names the scatter, what is already home, what moves, and the north star. Primitive discipline: only core.fk primitives (str_find, substring, str_len, str_eq, ge, lt, eq, add, if); no sub/mul/div, no 3-arg and.

fourth_arm_outputs: form-loader: verdict 255, fourth arm 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables), 1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree

ci_validation.notes: CI re-runs validate.sh across the suite for the new recipe + band + manifest row.

deploy_validation.notes: A Form stdlib recipe + proof band + teaching; no public HTTP endpoint change. Next: compose fl-is-bml? + compile_source_section + fl-preludes-line into a Form loader behind `form-cli run`, then repair form_cli_ask.sh to call it (ties to task_cce25328).

phase_gate.reason: Local four-way validation passed (verdict 255, 0 divergent); CI and merge remain pending. The full Form loader + form-cli run entry is the named north-star step.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The dialect-detection + prelude-resolution decisions that shells hardcoded are now a proven Form recipe the body owns — the foundation for a Form-native loader so wrappers stop hand-detecting dialect and the ask+ class of silent break cannot recur.
public_endpoints: none changed; the recipe is a Form stdlib body proven by validate.sh
test_flows: Four-kernel proof: the band runs on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu to verdict 255 with 0 divergent — BML detection, s-expr detection, and prelude-list extraction all agree.
